  • weekly picks (May 4 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 May 4th week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    05/25

    1. 2605.22881v1 Effects of compocasting process parameters on microstructural characteristics and tensile properties of A356-SiCp composites (arXiv)

    2. 2605.22887v1 Genome-Guided Interpretable Screening of Phase-Stable, Lead-Free Double Perovskite Absorbers for All-Inorganic Semiconductors, Sensors, and Photovoltaics with DFT-Validated Design Rules (arXiv)

    3. 2605.22906v1 Weak wave turbulence as a precursor to universal coarsening in a homogeneous Bose gas (arXiv)

    4. 2605.22908v1 Fractionalization, emergent SU($N$) symmetries, and fragmentation in layered quantum spin-orbital models (arXiv)

    7. 2605.22945v1 Non-reciprocal Coulomb drag in a ballistic quantum wire (arXiv)
